creator: nacai@iname.com
text:
I have fixed the gnomecore port to follow its latest version for 
5/10 ports freeze, Thanks!

It needs ORBit-0.4.3(in send-pr db), and gnomelibs-1.0.9
(in send-pr db, also)

When 3.2-RELEASE have this latest gnomecore, it have the latest GNOME.
If without gnomecore, it don't have. Because this is the core. :)

Deleted file: NONE
Added file: patches/patch-aj

Yukihiro Nakai
--------------
